questions.prompt: RAG vs. fine-tuning for current company knowledge?

choices.text: RAG. Easy to update; current data; explicit citations; lower compute. sentence-transformers embed + vector DB (Chroma/Pinecone/Weaviate/Qdrant) + LLM generates with retrieved context.

questions.explanation: RAG for knowledge; easy updates + citations. Fine-tune for style.

choices.text: Three stages: ASR (Whisper) → LLM (Llama/GPT) → TTS (Bark/XTTS). Specialized models per task. Stream for low latency.
LLM-as-judge — stronger LLM rates outputs against rubric. Plus user signals (thumbs up/down) + test sets. Scalable + nuanced.
Shadow mode → canary deployment → gradual rollout + monitoring + fast rollback. Standard safe model swap.
High volume (>100K queries/day) + privacy critical + customization needed + cost-sensitive at scale. Frontier closed wins for cutting-edge features + low volume + lean teams. Hybrid often best.

questions.explanation: Volume + privacy + customization + cost. Hybrid optimal.
